message:
feat: Implement Windows home path and Apple platform support

**ntpath.zig**:
- expanduser: Combine HOMEDRIVE + HOMEPATH for Windows home directory
  (e.g., "C:" + "\\Users\\Name" → "C:\\Users\\Name")

**_apple_support.zig**:
- getDeploymentTarget: Read MACOSX/IPHONEOS/TVOS/WATCHOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET
  env vars, parse version strings, return sensible defaults per platform
- getSdkPath: Check SDKROOT env, then probe common SDK locations
- hasFramework: Check /System/Library/Frameworks and /Library/Frameworks
  for framework existence
